title: Judge Dismisses Removal Case Against Cabarrus County Clerk
summary: Bill Baggs remains in office after allegations of misconduct were rejected in court.

title: Mecklenburg County Leaders Oppose Property Tax Cap Amendment

title: Understanding Crane Flies: Harmless Mosquito Look-Alikes
summary: Crane flies are often mistaken for mosquitoes but are larger and don't bite.
